Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.healthinsurance

Class CoverageRecord

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.healthinsurance.CoverageRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class CoverageRecord extends Object implements Serializable
A class that manages a history of coverage.
See Also:

    Returns the amount of income the person has remaining at the given time.

    Sets the person's payer history at the given time to the given payers.

    Sets the person's payer history at the given time to become no insurance.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoverageRecord

      public CoverageRecord(Person person)
      Create a new CoverageRecord for the given Person.
      Parameters:
      person - The person.

  • Method Details

    • getPlanHistory

      public Set<PlanRecord> getPlanHistory()
      Get the plan history associated with this CoverageRecord.
      Returns:
      the plan history

    • setPlanAtTime

      public void setPlanAtTime(long time, InsurancePlan newPlan, InsurancePlan secondaryPlan)
      Sets the person's payer history at the given time to the given payers.
      Parameters:
      time - the current simulation time
      newPlan - the primary insurance plan
      secondaryPlan - the secondary insurance plan (e.g., Medicare Supplemental Insurance)

    • setPlanToNoInsurance

      public void setPlanToNoInsurance(long time)
      Sets the person's payer history at the given time to become no insurance.
      Parameters:
      time - the current simulation time.

    • getPlanRecordAtTime

      public PlanRecord getPlanRecordAtTime(long time)
      Get the Plan active at a given time.
      Parameters:
      time - the time.
      Returns:
      the active plan.

    • getPlanAtTime

      public InsurancePlan getPlanAtTime(long time)
      Returns this coverage record history's record of the plan at the given time.
      Parameters:
      time - The time to get the person's plan at.
      Returns:
      The InsurancePlan at the given time.

    • getLastPlanRecord

      public PlanRecord getLastPlanRecord()
      Get the last plan record.
      Returns:
      the last plan.

    • newEnrollmentPeriod

      public boolean newEnrollmentPeriod(long time)
      Determines whether the person should enter an enrollment period and search for a new insurance plan. If so, the next enrollment period will be accordingly updated.
      Parameters:
      time - The current time.
      Returns:
      true if the person should enter an enrollment period, false otherwise.

    • getTotalOutOfPocketExpenses

      public BigDecimal getTotalOutOfPocketExpenses()
      Returns the total healthcare expenses for this person. Does not include premium costs.
      Returns:
      The healthcare expenses.

    • getTotalPremiumExpenses

      public BigDecimal getTotalPremiumExpenses()
      Returns the total premium expenses. Does not include healthcare expenses.
      Returns:
      The premium expenses.

    • getTotalCoverage

      public BigDecimal getTotalCoverage()
      Returns the total healthcare coverage for this person.
      Returns:
      The healthcare coverage.

    • incomeRemaining

      public int incomeRemaining(long time)
      Returns the amount of income the person has remaining at the given time.
      Parameters:
      time - The time to check for.
      Returns:
      The amount of income the person has remaining.

    • payMonthlyPremiumsAtTime

      public void payMonthlyPremiumsAtTime(long time, double employerLevel, int income)
      Pay monthly premiums to the payers at this time.
      Parameters:
      time - The time to pay the premiums.
      employerLevel - The employer contribution level.
      income - The income of the person.

    • updateLastPayerQols

      public void updateLastPayerQols(double qolsForYear)
      Update the quality of life score for the most recent plan.
      Parameters:
      qolsForYear - The quality of life score for the year.
